top_findings.title: Source code missing from archive — src/ and test/ directories not persisted
top_findings.evidence: find . -name '*.clj' returns 0 files; only deps.edn and README.md exist. _meta.json reports succeeded:true, retort.db has test_coverage=1.0 — code existed at test time but was not archived.
top_findings.suggestion: Investigate archival pipeline — all 3 reps of language=clojure_model=opus_tooling=none show the same pattern.

top_findings.title: POST /books — cannot verify from archive, source missing
top_findings.evidence: README.md:18 documents endpoint; test_coverage=1.0 in retort.db. No .clj files in archive.
top_findings.suggestion: Re-archive the run workspace with source files included.
